tech_stack.content: | **Compute**             | Kubernetes (EKS/ACK), Serverless (FC)           | ✅ **ACK (Alibaba Kubernetes)**: Integrated with Alibaba Cloud KMS (SM4), auto-scaling, CNCF-certified, supports air-gapped clusters for sensitive workloads.      | CBIRC §5.1 (infrastructure resilience), GB/T 35273-2020 (data security grading)         |

interface_design.content:
| **Customer Master** | • Unified Customer View (natural/juridical)
• UBO resolution engine (PEP/Sanctions screening via Refinitiv API)
• PIPL-compliant consent lifecycle (opt-in/opt-out/withdrawal)
• Document vault (SM4-encrypted PDF/A-3) | PIPL Art. 28–30 (consent), CBIRC §3.5 (UBO disclosure), P
